validation.addressMin: Address must be at least 10 characters.
validation.taxMax: Tax ID must be at most 32 characters.
validation.wifiSsidMax: Wi‑Fi name must be at most 64 characters.
validation.wifiPasswordMax: Wi‑Fi password must be at most 128 characters.
validation.paymentBankMax: Bank name must be at most 120 characters.
validation.paymentAccountMax: Account number must be at most 32 characters.
validation.paymentHolderMax: Account holder must be at most 120 characters.
validation.paymentNoteMax: Transfer memo must be at most 200 characters.
